[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A stylized, cartoon-like cat face is shown close-up with the text “Miau” at the bottom.

Main Subject:
A pale, cream-colored cat head and upper body fills most of the frame, with thick, dark, horizontal lines for closed eyes and a small triangular nose area, and a dark, collar-like band across the mouth and chin area.

Setting:
The background appears as a blurry, muted scene with greenish and gray tones, with no clear indoor or outdoor context visible.

Visual Details:
The image has a low-resolution, pixelated look. Lighting is soft and even, with the cat rendered in simple shapes and bold outlines. The background is indistinct and out of focus, creating contrast against the lighter cat figure. The word “Miau” appears in white, centered near the bottom.

Visible Text:
Miau

Practical Summary:
The image shows a cartoon-like cat illustration with closed-eye lines and a dark band across the face. The label “Miau” is displayed at the bottom of the image.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
